what_it_does: Defines a 24x24 SVG line icon depicting a user card with a rounded card frame, avatar mark, and short horizontal detail lines.
observations: Root SVG uses viewBox 0 0 24 24 with width and height set to 24.
The icon has fill="none" and stroke="currentColor" with 1.5 stroke width.
Stroke caps and joins are rounded.
A rounded rectangle forms the card boundary.
A circle and arc form the user/avatar area on the left.
Three horizontal line groups on the right suggest card details.
standouts: Combines a profile silhouette and metadata lines inside one card frame.
Uses currentColor so the icon inherits text or parent color.
No ids, classes, scripts, embedded styles, title, or desc elements are present.
conventions: Uses unfilled geometry with rounded stroke styling.
Keeps all geometry inline as SVG primitives and path data.
Uses compact path commands rather than grouping or named elements.
concerns: No intrinsic accessibility label or description is included.
The right-side detail strokes are combined into one path, so individual lines are not separately addressable.
notes: A compact currentColor SVG icon for representing a user/profile card or ID-style contact item.
questions: Should accessibility metadata be supplied inside the SVG or by the consuming component?
Are the card detail lines meant to represent text fields, profile metadata, or generic ID-card content?
purpose_vs_actual: The filename suggests a user-card icon, and the SVG content matches that purpose.
intention_signals: It appears intended as a reusable design-system icon that can inherit surrounding color while visually indicating a user profile card.
novelty: The left avatar mark and right metadata lines are arranged within a single rounded card outline.
contribution: Contributes a themeable 24px user-card glyph with clear card, avatar, and detail-line shapes for identity-related interface states or actions.
summary_for_embedding: A 24x24 currentColor SVG stroke icon showing a rounded user card with avatar silhouette and horizontal metadata lines.
intention_for_embedding: This file was for a reusable design-system icon representing a user profile card or ID-style contact card.
